name: Nasturtium & Grape Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together 3 tablespoons salad oil, 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar, 1½ teaspoons Dijon mustard, and 1 pinch black pepper.
2. On each of four plates, arrange 4 or 5 red lettuce leaves, ¼ cup grapes, 2 nasturtium leaves, and 4 nasturtium blossoms.
3. Drizzle the dressing equally over each salad.
4. Serve immediately.
